user_reason: aioli has nothing to do with our food — non relevant context
new_rule: Viral quote MUST be relevant to the brand's actual food/context. A mayo/aioli joke on a nasi lemak bento = disconnect. The quote must MAKE SENSE with the dish shown. If the viral quote has zero connection to the product, it fails semantic match even if the quote itself is funny.

user_reason: second pic for adventurous should be round bowl/pokebowl style, not rectangular bento
new_rule: Quiz/list formats need VISUAL VARIETY in the food photos — not all rectangular bentos. Mix round bowls, rectangular bentos, wraps to make each row visually distinct. Same container shape 3x = boring.

Timestamp format (2:00pm/2:04pm) needs a CLEAR visual progression — not just two bentos side by side. The joke is 'saving half for later = 4 minutes.' Visual should show: FULL bento → EMPTY bento (or half-eaten). Two full bentos side by side doesn't tell the 'I ate it all' story.

user_reason: photo editing over bright on the white part
new_rule: Film-grade food enhancement must NOT blow out whites. The bento container/rice should retain texture and detail — not become a white blob. Check histogram: if highlights clip above 245 on more than 5% of pixels, reduce brightness. White balance must preserve food container detail.

user_reason: totally off brand — gold calculator glitter is not Mirra
new_rule: Gold/brown glitter = OFF-BRAND for Mirra. Mirra sparkle must be PINK/rose gold/blush. Gold calculator, gold tones = wrong brand world. Audit must catch non-pink sparkle palette.

CONFIRMED: 'relationship status: emotionally attached to food' is a generic internet phrase, not traced to a specific viral post with engagement data. Desk lunch concept needs a REAL viral tweet source.
CONFIRMED: 'adulting is like folding a fitted sheet' is a common internet joke, not traced to a SPECIFIC viral post. Must find the actual viral tweet/post with handle and engagement.

user_reason: non mirra actual food — the food photos are not recognizably Mirra bentos
new_rule: Quiz/list food posts must use food photos that are RECOGNIZABLY the brand's actual products. If the viewer can't tell it's Mirra food vs generic food = fail. Sacred photos must be clearly Mirra's signature packaging/containers.

user_reason: logo touches content words — MIRRA overlaps bottom text
new_rule: CONFIRMED: When viral quote runs along the bottom, logo MUST go to top-right or top-left. Pre-check text position before logo placement. If bottom 20% has text, logo = TR.
CONFIRMED: NANO duplicates words in long quotes. Must proofread every word in output.
